heading: Everything you need to know before getting started

items.a: AlgoFlow includes 25+ algorithms across sorting, searching, graphs, and more. Each comes with step-by-step visualization and synced pseudocode.

items.q: Can I use AlgoFlow on mobile?
items.a: AlgoFlow is optimized for desktop and tablet. A mobile-friendly experience is planned for a future release.

items.q: How does the practice integration work?
items.a: One click takes you to LeetCode, HackerRank, or NeetCode with the algorithm you just learned. Apply your knowledge immediately with real problems.
Reach out via the support link in the app or email us. We typically respond within 24 hours.

items.q: How can I contribute to AlgoFlow (make a PR)?
items.a: AlgoFlow is open source! You can contribute by reporting bugs, suggesting features, or submitting pull requests on our GitHub repository. Check the README for contribution guidelines.
